headline: Nike To End Adidas' 25-Year Reign As UEFA Champions League Ball Sponsor—Not A 'Silver Bullet' Says Analyst
summary: Nike is on the verge of replacing Adidas AG as the official match ball sponsor for the UEFA Champions League, thereby ending Adidas’s 25-year dominance. Nike is in exclusive discussions to supply balls for all UEFA men’s club competitions from 2027 to 2031, including the Europa League and Conference League, the Financial Times reported on Thursday. The deal’s value is expected to surge, potentially doubling to more than €40 million ($46.75 million) annually. This development marks a significant
